name: Conrad Aiken
abstract: Conrad Potter Aiken (August 5, 1889 – August 17, 1973) was an American writer and poet, honored with a Pulitzer Prize and a National Book Award, and was United States Poet Laureate from 1950 to 1952. His published works include poetry, short stories, novels, literary criticism, a play, and an autobiography.

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: He put Faulkner, Conrad Aiken, and all these people that he wrote scripts about.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hentoff Nat — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
